title: Use Universal Commits to purchase Marketplace partner products ​
body:
**June 15, 2026**

You can now use up to 10% of your Universal Commits to purchase eligible third-party partner products through Databricks Marketplace. See [Databricks Marketplace Universal Commit Drawdown program](/aws/en/marketplace/#drawdown-program).

ref_links.text: Databricks Marketplace Universal Commit Drawdown program
